name: io.github.NameetP/pdfmux
title: pdfmux
description: PDF-to-Markdown orchestrator. Routes each page to the best extractor (PyMuPDF, Docling, RapidOCR, Gemini Flash), audits output, re-extracts low-confidence pages, and returns Markdown with per-page confidence scores. 5 tools exposed over stdio.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Google AI API key. Enables the paid Gemini Flash fallback for pages where all local backends report low confidence. pdfmux runs 100% locally without this.
